{"credits": [], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-42782", "cvss": {"score": 7.2, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:H/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:H/A:H"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 7.2, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:H/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:H/A:H"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-653", "name": "Improper Isolation or Compartmentalization"}], "description": "Improper Isolation or Compartmentalization vulnerability in Apache Syncope.

An administrator with adequate entitlements for Implementations can create a malicious Groovy class containing untrusted code reaching a non-sandboxed execution path via the class static initializer.

This issue affects Apache Syncope: 3.0 through 3.0.16, 4.0 through 4.0.5, 4.1.0.

Users are recommended to upgrade to version 4.0.6 / 4.1.1, which fix this issue by forcing even the static initializer in Groovy code to run in a sandbox.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00652, "percentile": 0.46513}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-gq7g-vg2q-jvq3", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-30T17:18:21Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-gq7g-vg2q-jvq3", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-gq7g-vg2q-jvq3"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-42782"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-05-25T16:16:19Z", "published_at": "2026-05-26T13:30:46Z", "references": ["https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-42782", "https://lists.apache.org/thread/b869ms0ofrd129f7tgsn9flxgv9ztg2r", "http://www.openwall.com/lists/oss-security/2026/05/25/4", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-gq7g-vg2q-jvq3"], "repository_advisory_url": null, "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "", "summary": "Apache Syncope has an Improper Isolation or Compartmentalization vulnerability", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-30T17:18:22Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-gq7g-vg2q-jvq3", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": null, "package": {"ecosystem": "maven", "name": "org.apache.syncope.core:syncope-core-spring"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 3.0.0-M0, <= 3.0.16"}, {"first_patched_version": "4.0.6", "package": {"ecosystem": "maven", "name": "org.apache.syncope.core:syncope-core-spring"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 4.0.0-M0, < 4.0.6"}, {"first_patched_version": "4.1.1", "package": {"ecosystem": "maven", "name": "org.apache.syncope.core:syncope-core-spring"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 4.1.0-M0, < 4.1.1"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Apache Syncope has an Improper Isolation or Compartmentalization vulnerability
